title: fix: cache model health consumers
author: ElliotEtag
pr_body_excerpt:
- Routes model-monitor and polli CLI health requests through the cached `gen.pollinations.ai/v1/models/status` gateway.
- Supports windows up to 7 days while bounding the in-memory cache to 32 recent entries.
- Exposes Tinybird fetch timestamps and stale-fallback state so the monitor reports truthful data freshness.
- Aligns the 5-minute monitor poll with the 60-second cache and validates CLI windows from 1 to 10080 minutes.
- Updates public stats documentation for gateway authentication and freshness headers.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write` on changed source and test files
- `npx vitest run test/index.test.ts --testNamePattern="model status"`
- `npm run typecheck --prefix gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run build --prefix packages/polli-cli`
- `npm run build --prefix apps/model-monitor`
- Manual CLI invalid-window and help checks

Note: no Tinybird deploy was required or performed.

gist.headline: Caching the hive's health
gist.blurb: We've optimized how the model monitor and CLI fetch health stats. Faster load times and smarter caching mean you get the freshest data without overwhelming the hive.
gist.summary: Routes model-monitor and polli CLI health requests through a cached gateway at gen.pollinations.ai/v1/models/status, supporting up to 7-day windows with a 32-entry in-memory cache.
gist.impact: Developers checking model health via the CLI or monitor will experience faster, more reliable responses with clear data freshness headers.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot checking a glowing dashboard screen with a stopwatch, representing cached, fast health stats.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head looking at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) dashboard screen showing health stats. The bee holds a tiny stopwatch. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
